entities.description: bookrag is a system whose performance bottlenecks are being diagnosed through error analysis
figure 9 is a visual representation showing the error propagation traced during the analysis
error response analysis is the specific task conducted to diagnose performance bottlenecks
200 sampled queries refers to the quantity of queries from each dataset used for the analysis
four types refers to the number of categories into which failures are classified

relations.description: figure 9 illustrates the error propagation traced while diagnosing the performance bottlenecks of bookrag
error response analysis is performed on bookrag to diagnose its performance bottlenecks
the analysis is conducted on 200 sampled queries from each dataset
the analysis traces error propagation as shown in figure 9
the analysis categorizes failures into four types
